compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect live DSO NextJS template repo
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

What: Update project documentation to reflect the new live template repo and clear stale references to the old/missing template URL or prior assumptions.
Why: Stale references and missing documentation pointers will mislead users and future contributors once the template is live.
Scope:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md, scripts/create-dso-app.sh docstring / plugins/dso/README.md, docs/onboarding.md, docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md, tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh, .test-index, and KNOWN-ISSUES.md.
- OUT: New documentation files; restructuring unrelated to this epic.

## Done Definitions

- When complete, CLAUDE.md references the live template repo (one-line mention in architecture or quick reference section).
  Satisfies: SC4 (supporting)
- When complete, scripts/create-dso-app.sh docstring or plugins/dso/README.md points at the template repo URL and NOTICE.
  Satisfies: SC4 (supporting)
- When complete, residual references to the old/missing template URL or prior assumptions are updated or removed across: plugins/dso/README.md, docs/onboarding.md, docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md, tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh, .test-index. (Applied from adversarial review F6.)
  Satisfies: SC4 (supporting)
- When complete, KNOWN-ISSUES.md notes the historical failure mode (epic baff-7163 shipped with missing external deliverable) for future reference.
  Satisfies: cross-cutting

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for all documentation updates.

## Escalation Policy

Escalation policy: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue - one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body:
Done — commit 50c79fbd. DD evidence:
- DD1 (CLAUDE.md ref): one-line entry under Architecture section pointing at the live template, NOTICE, real-URL e2e, and contract doc ✓
- DD2 (installer or plugin README): scripts/create-dso-app.sh docstring header AND plugins/dso/README.md both reference the template URL + NOTICE ✓
- DD3 (residual stale refs): docs/onboarding.md, docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md, scripts/create-dso-app.sh, plugins/dso/README.md all updated. tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh was already updated by sibling story b7e3-1280. .test-index needs no entry (new e2e test is fuzzy-matchable to its source). ✓
- DD4 (KNOWN-ISSUES historical failure): docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md INC-022 records epic baff-7163's failure mode and how this epic resolves it ✓
- DD5 (unit tests pass): test-create-dso-app.sh PASSED 45/45; opus-tier review passed score=5; full pre-commit suite passed (test gate, review gate, ShellCheck, Plugin Boundary, Self-Ref, Enforcement Boundary)
comments.author: Test
